case_title: MENDER, YODIT T. VS ASSEFAW, YONAS G.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MENDER, YODIT T. AS TO DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G.

ORDER TO STAY THE WRIT ISSUED IN ALAMEDA COUNTY ON 3-19-03, SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.
CERT MAIL SENT TO YONAS ASSEFAW RETURNED SIGNED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDER, YODIT T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,032.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $84.88 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G.
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDER, YODIT T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ASSEFAW, YONAS G. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27209 ON 5/21/03 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVSION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
